name: bump-ci-actions
title: Bump CI actions to checkout v7 + setup-python v6
description: Supersede dependabot #98/#99: bump actions/checkout to v7.0.0 and actions/setup-python to v6.3.0 (pinned SHAs) in the workflow + update the parity test's pinned SHAs. Dependabot can't update the test, so its PRs fail.
creator: sdelmas
